m3.action: Place 3 simultaneous tickets: (1) Home Win, (2) Draw, (3) Away Win by exactly 1 goal. Verify Away-by-1-goal margin odds at 3.00+ on your bookmaker before placing.

recommended_ticket.note: Combined odds 1.14 below minimum 2.0. Do not place — wait for more qualifying matches.

bankroll_reference.note: Multiply base stake by this value after each consecutive loss. Return to 1x after any win.
